script:
set +e
echo === look for owner/aad gate in bot code ===
for s in heather afrah jose alejandro david; do
  echo "--- $s"
  sudo grep -nE 'aadObjectId|from_aad|OWNER|owner_aad|allowed_user|authorized' /home/$s/${s}-bot.py /home/$s/${s}-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -6
done
echo
echo === any common gate library? ===
sudo grep -nE 'aadObjectId|owner' /home/azureuser/bot_framework_auth.py /home/heather/bot_framework_auth.py 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo
echo === current TAPP global policy ===
TOK=$(curl -s -H 'Metadata:true' 'http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=https://graph.microsoft.com' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOK" 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/policies/teamsAppSetupPolicies' 2>&1 | head -c 400
echo
echo === how is global TAPP set (Skype) ===
ST=$(curl -s -H 'Metadata:true' 'http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=48ac35b8-9aa8-4d74-927d-1f4a14a0b239' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $ST" 'https://api.interfaces.records.teams.microsoft.com/Skype.Policy/policies/TeamsAppPermissionPolicy?tag=Global' 2>&1 | head -c 600
